## Checklist

- [ ] `python3 -m compileall -q .` passes
- [ ] CLIs run against a throwaway directory without crashing
- [ ] Updated `README.md` (EN) and `README.de.md` (DE) if behavior changed
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] New/changed replacement rules live in `config/` where possible
